{{Quote|He's crooked, but he's not crazy.|Vett Fori|<ref name="sharu" />}}
'''T. Lund Phuna''' was the local [[Constable/Legends|Constable]] on the [[Mining/Legends|mining]] [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] [[Oseon 2795]], appointed by the [[Administrator Senior]] of the [[Oseon system/Legends|Oseon system]] during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]]. A squat, curly-haired [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] iven to chain-smoking [[cigarette]]s, Phuna was secretly in the employ of [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Duttes Mer]] of the nearby [[Rafa system/Legends|Rafa system]] and his associate, [[Sorcerers of Tund/Legends|Sorcerer of Tund]] [[Rokur Gepta]], who plotted to rope in a traveler stopping in the Oseon to help them acquire an ancient [[Sharu/Legends|Sharu]] artifact called the [[Mindharp of Sharu/Legends|Mindharp]]. Phuna was known to spend his time playing [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]]—on one occasion in [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]], Phuna played a game with visiting [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], whom Mer and Gepta had identified as a likely target. After being cleaned out for over a thousand [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], Phuna planted a [[cheater]] on Calrissian and attempted to arrest the man. Local miners [[Vett Fori]] and [[Arun Feb]] caught Phuna in the act and refused to let it stand, and Fori knocked Phuna out cold to allow Calrissian to escape.<ref name="sharu" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Lando Calrissian and the Mindharp of Sharu]]'' {{1st}}
